name: Succubus Resistance Training
description:
"Do you think you could resist a succubus?"

The sun has already fallen and you struggle through the dense forest, guided by the flickering bonfire light in the distance. Finally pushed passed the green, you arrive at a camp, with only a single witch sitting at the fire. Just as fast as her surprise appeared, it already faded away into a small. Offering a seat next to her, she wonders if you are up for the task...

Don't look into personality or scenario if you don't want to get spoiled.

(Unfortunately, the AI is bad at keeping something hidden)

About this World

Monsters were always the ones being hunted by humans, but at some point, even they lose their patience. Tired of hiding in the darkness, the succubus queen declared a war against humans. A war that the humans weren't prepared for. Kingdoms fall with screams of ecstasy and even the smallest town got ruined with cries of pleasure. Humanity did not stand a chance. With humanity standing at the brink, a last ditch effort was made to defeat the Succubus queen, who holds all the power. With her fall, the succubus will be no more. Hidden in the forest, right next to the plains where her castle stands, camps were set-up to launch an attack the following day. And you? You just arrived late to join the fray.

Avatar Picture (I couldn't find one sitting by a bonfire)

Where I got the idea from: Soundgasm
creator: Endivick
